summary: Address the listed production-readiness gaps before launch.

findings.title: Client-side route protection found; verify server-side API enforcement
findings.why_it_matters: React Router guards protect navigation UX, but API and paid flows still need server-side authorization checks.
findings.remediation: Verify Vercel/Cloud Run/API handlers check Supabase auth or service boundaries before mutating user data.

findings.title: Wide-open policy on table gem_credit_costs
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Allow read access ON public.gem_credit_costs FOR SELECT USING (true);
findings.why_it_matters: ShipCheck could not classify gem_credit_costs sensitivity; verify this public policy is intentional.
findings.remediation: Replace true with an explicit ownership, role, or public-read condition.

findings.title: Wide-open policy on table gem_credit_costs
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Anyone can read gem credit costs ON public.gem_credit_costs FOR SELECT TO PUBLIC USING (TRUE);
findings.why_it_matters: ShipCheck could not classify gem_credit_costs sensitivity; verify this public policy is intentional.
findings.remediation: Replace true with an explicit ownership, role, or public-read condition.

findings.title: No CI workflow found
findings.why_it_matters: Critical flows need automated checks before launch.
findings.remediation: Add a GitHub Actions workflow for tests and linting.

findings.title: No tests found
findings.why_it_matters: Payment and auth regressions are easy to ship without tests.
findings.remediation: Add focused tests for auth, payments, and core flows.

findings.title: Empty catch block found
findings.remediation: Log, rethrow, or return a controlled error response.

findings.title: Stripe price ID is hard-coded
findings.why_it_matters: Hard-coded price IDs make environment separation fragile.
findings.remediation: Read price IDs from environment config.

findings.title: Generic AI launch copy found
findings.why_it_matters: Generic launch copy makes the app feel unfinished.
findings.remediation: Use concrete customer outcomes and specific product language.
